User.title: User
User.description: User profile containing name, email, and security configurations.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: Financial project that acts as an umbrella folder of properties, cash flows, and investments.

type.description: Underlying categorization of the project type

value.description: Reconciled sum value of all linked assets

isExpense.description: Deprecated helper indicating if is cost-driven

monthlyProfit.description: Reconciled monthly net surplus (Receita minus Despesa)

trend.description: Monthly percentage yield or increase trend value

imageUrl.description: Header background photo URL for client UI screens

ownerId.description: UID of the creator/owner user document

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Individual movement of resources representing positive income flows or negative outlays/liabilities.

title.description: Direct human name description of the purchase or receipt

date.description: ISO String representation format of date

ownerId.description: UID of the session owner user

Asset.title: Asset
Asset.description: Tangible properties, holdings, stocks, cash reserves, or liquid assets aligned under a project folder.

subCategory.description: Sub category context or status details

value.description: Current fair-market price valuation in BRL

description.description: Notes on purchase details or tenant rules

city.description: State and municipal location detail if real estate

CollabMember.title: CollabMember
CollabMember.description: Collaborator members linked to shared projects.

CollabInvite.title: CollabInvite
CollabInvite.description: Pending project invitation for collaborative access.

CollabActivity.title: CollabActivity
CollabActivity.description: Recent activity audit log of a project, including peer transactions updates.

/users/{userId}.description: User settings and profile registration info mapped under their unique auth UID.

/projects/{projectId}.description: Projects folder directory owned by active authenticated users.

/transactions/{transactionId}.description: Financial ledger transactions mapped globally and grouped dynamically in code.

/assets/{assetId}.description: Historic and present asset acquisitions owned by the authenticated profiles.

/collabMembers/{memberId}.description: Active collaborator members with access levels per project.

/collabInvites/{inviteId}.description: Pending invites waiting acceptance by a specific email user.

/collabActivities/{activityId}.description: Recent system logs for project updates.
